tool_args.label: Corporate Governance Committee Meeting Book - March 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Corporate Governance Committee Meeting book containing staff summaries, All Agency General Contract Procurement Guidelines, All Agency Service Contract Procurement Guidelines, MTA Codes of Ethics (All-Agency and Board Members), Mission Statement and Performance Indicators Report covering FY 2022, Rules of Conduct revisions, and Whistleblower Protection Policy.

payload.title: Corporate Governance Committee Meeting
payload.description: Corporate Governance Committee Meeting book for March 27, 2023, containing meeting agenda, minutes from November 29, 2022, staff summaries, procurement guidelines, codes of ethics, mission statement and performance indicators report, rules of conduct revisions, and whistleblower protection policy.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
